title: Choosing an ORM Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on factors to consider when choosing an Object-Relational Mapper.

questions.question: Which of these is a key factor to consider when selecting an ORM?
Which ORM is known for its excellent TypeScript support and automatic migrations?
If your project is using MongoDB, which of these is the most common ODM to use?
What is the main benefit of having a large community and ecosystem behind an ORM?
